contexts.context: ...so kind as to confirm that you took the <mark>ecumenical</mark> service - shall ISscall it that? in the church...
...here because though common practice in England such an <mark>ecumenical</mark> service was a novelty here and caused much comment...
...last that it ought to be some kind of <mark>ecumenical</mark> ceremony held jointly by the two clergymen, but...
...ideas, but it was finally agreed that an <mark>ecumenical</mark> service would be appropriate, the texts to be spoken...
